ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the town where the property is located */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number of the property */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Street name where the property is located */,
  "floor_area_sqm" REAL /* Floor area of the property in square meters */,
  "flat_model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flat model of the property */,
  "lease_commence_date" TEXT /* Date when the lease commenced */,
  "remaining_lease" TEXT /* Remaining lease period of the property */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number of the property */,
  "unit_number" TEXT /* Unit number within the block */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last inspection date of the property */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled inspection date of the property */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("town_id") REFERENCES towns ("town_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_flat_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("flat_model_id") REFERENCES flat_models ("flat_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "towns" (
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each town */,
  "town_name" TEXT /* Name of the town */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the town is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the town */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the town */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the town */,
  "land_area_sqkm" REAL /* Land area of the town in square kilometers */,
  "total_properties" INTEGER /* Total number of properties in the town */,
  "total_occupied_properties" INTEGER /* Total number of occupied properties in the town */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the town's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flat_models" (
  "flat_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flat model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the flat model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flat model */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the flat model */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the flat model */,
  "is_accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the flat model is accessible */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the flat model's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flat_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "min_floor_area_sqm" REAL /* Minimum floor area for the property type */,
  "max_floor_area_sqm" REAL /* Maximum floor area for the property type */,
  "is_hdb" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property type is an HDB property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the property type's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, lease renewal) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the transaction */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type */,
  "is_sale_record" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is a sale record */,
  "is_lease_record" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is a lease record */,
  "is_rental_record" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is a rental record */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_records_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES property_owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_records_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES property_owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_records_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_records_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry, analyst, admin) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the user's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user at the time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property with the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature type */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature is required */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., exterior, interior) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is the default image for the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leases" (
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being leased */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease */,
  "rent_amount" REAL /* Rent amount for the lease */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the lease is currently active */,
  "is_routine_inspection_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if routine inspections are required for the lease */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the lease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the tenant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tenant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the tenant */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tenant is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the tenant's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the owner */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the owner is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the owner's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being owned */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "ownership_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the ownership */,
  "ownership_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the ownership */,
  "is_transfer_pending" INTEGER /* Indicates if an ownership transfer is pending */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the ownership record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_ownership_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES property_owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_ownership_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., data update, deletion) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_audits_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the report is about */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., valuation, inspection) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_reports_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, lease payment) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., cash, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the transaction */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is completed */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is cancelled */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
